title: Yarjejeniyar Girbi ta Gaba
subtitle: Yarda da farashin kowace kilogiram tun farko - biyan kuɗi na ƙarshe ya danganta da nauyin ainihi da za a auna lokacin isarwa.

incoming_description: Masu saye suna neman masu sayar da amfanin gona - karɓi yarjejeniya don sayar musu.
